scripts.lint: bun run build && bun run lint:ox
scripts.lint:ox: bun run lint:ox:fraction && bun run lint:ox:vercel-ai && bun run lint:ox:tanstack-ai && bun run lint:ox:benchmarks
scripts.lint:fix: bun run build && bun x oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json --fix --tsconfig packages/fraction/tsconfig.oxc.json packages/fraction && bun x oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json --fix --tsconfig packages/vercel-ai/tsconfig.oxc.json packages/vercel-ai && bun x oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json --fix --tsconfig packages/tanstack-ai/tsconfig.oxc.json packages/tanstack-ai && bun x oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json --fix --tsconfig tsconfig.oxc.json benchmarks
scripts.fmt: bun x oxfmt -c .oxfmtrc.json --write packages benchmarks package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.oxc.json tsconfig.oxc.base.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
scripts.fmt:check: bun x oxfmt -c .oxfmtrc.json --check packages benchmarks package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.oxc.json tsconfig.oxc.base.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
